scripts.dev:prepare: bun run --cwd ../../packages/http-contracts build && bun run --cwd ../../packages/core-runtime build && bun run --cwd ../../packages/geo-sql build && bun run --cwd ../../packages/ops build
scripts.dev: bun run dev:prepare && MAP_FORCE_KILL_PORT_BEFORE_START=1 nodemon --delay 300ms --watch src --watch ../../packages/http-contracts/dist --watch ../../packages/core-runtime/dist --watch ../../packages/geo-sql/dist --watch ../../packages/ops/dist --ext ts,js,json --signal SIGTERM --exec "bun --env-file .env src/index.ts"
scripts.dev:sync-worker: bun run dev:prepare && nodemon --delay 300ms --watch src --watch ../../packages/http-contracts/dist --watch ../../packages/core-runtime/dist --watch ../../packages/geo-sql/dist --watch ../../packages/ops/dist --ext ts,js,json --signal SIGTERM --exec "bun --env-file .env src/sync-worker.ts"
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.json && bash ../../scripts/normalize-api-dist-imports.sh dist
